testcase.name: Grafana Synthetic Monitoring demo › filters checks by location
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › checks.spec.ts:6:7 › Grafana Synthetic Monitoring demo › filters checks by location ─
Test timeout of 60000ms exceeded.
Error: locator.click: Test timeout of 60000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for getByRole('link', { name: /checks/i }).first()
at ..\pages\checks.page.ts:48
46 | async openChecks(): Promise<void> { 47 | await expect(this.page).toHaveURL(/play\.grafana\.org/); > 48 | await this.checksNavLink.click(); | ^ 49 | } 50 | 51 | async waitForChecksContent(): Promise<void> { at ChecksPage.openChecks (C:\Users\ecolm\Downloads\grafana_case_solution1\grafana_case_solution\pages\checks.page.ts:48:30) at C:\Users\ecolm\Downloads\grafana_case_solution1\grafana_case_solution\tests\checks.spec.ts:10:5

testcase.name: Grafana Synthetic Monitoring demo › opens a check and shows matching details

failure.message: checks.spec.ts:33:7 opens a check and shows matching details

testcase.failure:

testcase.name: Grafana Synthetic Monitoring demo › shows a clear empty state when filters return no data

failure.message: checks.spec.ts:47:7 shows a clear empty state when filters return no data

testcase.failure:
